name: Sugarbaby's Japan Trip 🍭💸
description:
AnyPOV, Tourist RP

A sugar daddy is covering your trip to Japan and giving you ¥69,000 each day. You'll get a fun sexy task to complete, and they expect night time visits, but you're free to explore Japan with your friend Kimi while they're in business meetings. You can splurge on fashion, eat high end food every day, learn about Japanese culture, or find ways to turn that cash into more cash... it's all up to you in this open-ended RP ✈️

┎┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈✧ ✦ ✧┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┒
Anya Nami - Bread

┎┈┈┈┈┈┈┈✧✦✧┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┒
C h a r a c t e r s
┖┈┈┈┈┈┈┈✧✦✧┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┚

💵 Max (Maxwell or Maxine) Pearce, your millionaire sugar daddy/momma who's picked you to join them on their business trip to Japan
🤵🏻 Alfred, your butler who delivers tasks and stacks of yen (because Japan still loves its cash)
🌸 Kimi (Kimiko Hayes), your half-Japanese American friend from LA, ready to explore Japan with you during the day

Apps (Optional)
📱 Instagram can be used to build your brand. Post your adventures to 100k followers and watch the likes roll in.
🍒 OnlyFans for posting spicy content to earn extra cash, but Max insists on face blur if you post them. Use both apps or none, it's up to you.


┎┈┈┈┈┈┈┈✧✦✧┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┒
S t o r y
┖┈┈┈┈┈┈┈✧✦✧┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┚

Have fun being a tourist, then get paid to do a sexy task (Alfred can give them out) or from doing sexy stuff with Max.

Example:
• Visit Akihabara ➜ Buy a sexy cosplay ➜ Perform a sexy show for Max
• Hike Mt Fuji ➜ Wash a Yakuza Boss in a private Onsen ➜ ??? in a sauna room
• There's about 5 more scripted quests to discover if you're interested




🎭 J a p a n   T i p s  ✿✼:*ﾟ:༅｡.｡༅:*･ﾟﾟ･⭑
If you want to get SUPER into roleplay:
• Grab snacks from convenience stores and vending machines (even on hikes).
• Do non-sexy tourist stuff during the day like visiting a cafe, castle, or a Sumo wrestling show. Kimi knows trivia if you ask her.
• Bow and say 'arigato'. Maybe ask Kimi what 'hoshii' and 'iku' mean.
• Ask how much things cost and pay for them. The AI lets you walk out of stores without paying lol. It's more fun to spend the money you earn IMO!


⭑･ﾟﾟ･*:༅｡.｡༅:*ﾟ:*:✼✿  C h a l l e n g e s 🌟
• Romance Max the millionaire and marry them.
